lines.lyrics: If life was a novel, each day a page
Long to be read, freed from its cage
We'd get high with the highs and low with the lows
Can't set it down, where does the story go?
Another day gone, another page turns
This day is blessed, vows will be heard
She walks down the aisle, all heads are turned
A story of hearts, in witness confirmed
Okay to be lost, born to be found!
Someone who loves you, 2 hearts are bound
She's falling into him, can't let it go
Knowing she belongs, feels like home
Adoring each other, look in their eyes
Doves are set free, set to the skies
Remember the music filling our home
She found true love, never alone
Okay to be lost, born to be found!
Someone who loves you, 2 hearts are bound
She's falling into him, can't let it go
Knowing she belongs, feels like home
Climbing up 285, trying to chase the view
Feeling my heart when I see that side of you
Feeling the moment, our time on the river shore
You and the sunset, no one could love you more!
Okay to be lost, born to be found!
Someone who loves you, 2 hearts are bound
She's falling into him, can't let it go
Knowing she belongs, feels like home
